formula: ApexAGI = O o P7 o T o Vt o Au; O_intersection_T = empty

truth_boundary.O: ApexAGI/Hermes orchestrator creates task, judges evidence, and verifies outputs
truth_boundary.T: Pi is permitted only as external read-only coding-agent probe in this batch
truth_boundary.Vt: Docker replay may run with sudo; CubeSandbox remains blocked by missing /dev/kvm
truth_boundary.Au: hot_switch_effective=false; no production switch in this batch

p7.task: identify ApexAGI integration files and current blockers
generate read-only Pi probe with restricted tools
read-only repository inspection, no file writes
inspect Pi output and git diff/status
run py_compile, P7 preflight, Vt readiness, APEX gate, Harness gate
decide whether T layer is ready for a future scoped defect patch
